phrases.en: Tom recorded an outgoing message on his machine.
phrases.zh: 汤姆在答录机上录了一段问候语。

phrases.en: When Jenny called, she heard the message.
phrases.zh: 珍妮打电话时，听到了那段问候语。

phrases.en: And left her own message for him.
phrases.zh: 并给他留了自己的口信。

phrases.en: When Tom got home, he saw a light showing that he had a message.
phrases.zh: 汤姆回到家，看到指示灯亮着，说明有一条留言。

phrases.en: He pressed the button to play the message.
As he listened to it, he took some notes.
phrases.zh: 他一边听，一边记了些笔记。

phrases.en: We can't come to the phone right now. After the beep, please leave a message.
phrases.zh: 我们现在无法接听电话。请在嘟声后留言。

phrases.en: Tom, this is Jenny. Please call me back at the office before six o'clock.
phrases.zh: 汤姆，我是珍妮。请六点之前给我办公室回电话。
